ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { titulo: "QUERYPARAMS", peticion1: "localhost:8081/request //sin variable", peticion2: "localhost:8081/request?variable1=valor //Petición con variable", peticion3: "localhost:8081/request?variable1=valor&variable2=valor2 //Petición con múltiples variables (&)", peticion4: "localhost:8081/request?variable1=valor&variable2=valor2&pordefectot= //variable default", "default": attributes.queryParams.pordefecto default "valor default cuando el parámetro es null", acceso: "attributes.queryParams.variable1", casteo: "attributes.queryParams.numero as Number", resultado: attributes.queryParams.numero as Number, }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { titulo: "URIPARAMS", peticion:"localhost:8081/uriparams/id", listener: "uriparams/{id}", request: "localhost:8081/uriParams/10", acceso: "attributes.uriParams.id", resultado: attributes.uriParams.id }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { titulo:"HEADERS", peticion:"localhost:8081/header", headers:"Para metadatos enviadas por HTTP que no forman parte de la url ni body. Usados para autenticación y tipo contenido (content-type)", ejemplo: "Key: X-API-KEY Value: mi-clave-secreta-123
Key: Authorization Value: Bearer abcdef12345", acceso: "attributes.headers //Usar comillas si se incluye guiones", }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "titulo": payload.titulo as String, "referencia":"payload.atributo //se usa payload. y el atributo a obtener.", "attributes": payload.attributes as String, "queryParams": payload.queryParams as String, "uriParams": payload.uriParams as String, "headers": payload.headers as String, "method": payload.method as String, "requestPath": payload.requestPath as String }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { titulo: "CONCATENACIÓN", peticion1: "localhost:8081/metodos", metodo:"attributes.method", resultado: attributes.method, concatenacion: "variable1: "++" ++ (attributes.queryParams.variable as String)", resultado: "variable1: " ++ (attributes.queryParams.variable1 as String) }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { titulo: "SET VARIABLE", metodo: "attributes.queryParams.numero as Number //Con Set Variable", resultado: vars.uriParam }
